title: Second-Order SQL Injection
description: AccountVault parameterises the INSERT but interpolates the stored username back into the UPDATE on change-password. Smuggle SQL through registration to take over admin.

hints.text: Registration is parameterised — but the stored value is later interpolated into a different query. What username would terminate a string literal and comment out the rest of the WHERE clause?
Register with username admin'-- and any password. Login. Call /change-password. Then login as admin with your new password.
